RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Plaintiffs' motion to advance current trial date with preference pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a) is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs failed to meet the requirements of section 36(a) because they failed to demonstrate that Mr. Glover's health is such that preference is necessary to prevent prejudicing his interest in the litigation. In addition, the Court stated that it will treat this as an expedited trial. Trial date of 02/10/14 remains. If circumstances change, plaintiffs may bring an ex parte application requesting an order shortening time. Counsel for defendant Certainteed Corporation to prepare a proposed form of order (to comply with CRC 3.1312). Judge: Teri L.
